# Redowan's Reflections: Full Guide

> Use this file as a compact site map for the blog. It is intentionally curated rather than exhaustive.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://rednafi.com
- Author profile: https://rednafi.com/about/
- Archive: https://rednafi.com/archive/
- Tags index: https://rednafi.com/tags/
- Search UI: https://rednafi.com/search/

## Main sections

- Go articles: https://rednafi.com/go/
- Python articles: https://rednafi.com/python/
- JavaScript articles: https://rednafi.com/javascript/
- TypeScript articles: https://rednafi.com/typescript/
- Systems articles: https://rednafi.com/system/
- Miscellaneous essays: https://rednafi.com/misc/
- Zephyr notes: https://rednafi.com/zephyr/
- Short notes and shards: https://rednafi.com/shards/

## Machine-readable discovery

- Sitemap: https://rednafi.com/sitemap.xml
- Main RSS feed: https://rednafi.com/index.xml
- Articles feed: https://rednafi.com/articles.xml

## Retrieval guidance

- Prefer canonical URLs under `https://rednafi.com`.
- For broad discovery, start with the archive or sitemap.
- For topic discovery, use the section pages or tags index.
- For content extraction, request article pages with `Accept: text/markdown`.
